settings.metric: best wall time after CUDA synchronize

cuda_graph_decode_int8.quantization: int8 weight-only (torchao), text decoder + lm_head only, opt-in
int8 weight-only (torchao), text decoder + lm_head only, opt-in

notes.configuration: CUDA graph decode is the default path: self-feeding captured graph (token feedback, mask and position computation in-graph) with a torch.compile'd (max-autotune-no-cudagraphs) decode step, prefill written directly into the StaticCache.
notes.correctness: bf16 transcripts byte-identical to the pre-optimization implementation on a 4-clip x 2-size x 2-path verification set. int8: 7/8 transcripts identical, one clip changed a single word.
notes.previous_baseline: Pre-optimization (commit 20ee9b1, 11.0s JFK clip): 0.6B dynamic 0.3951s / graph 0.2863s; 1.7B dynamic 1.5435s / graph 0.6296s.
